data:
P  R  E  O  N  E    E  N  T  E  R  P  R  I  S  E
PreOne Business Rules Catalog
Enterprise Preschool Operating System
Document: BRC v1.0
Status: Draft (Business Review)
Date: 2026-07-12
Total Rules: 176 across 12 categories
Predecessor: BPM v1.0 (Business Freeze)
Successor: Master PRD v1.0
Classification: Internal Engineering Reference
Prepared by: PreOne Product & Architecture Team

PreOne Platform                                        BRC v1.0
Unique identifier (R-DOM-NNN format). Stable, never reused.
Business domain the rule belongs to (from BPM).
IF age<2.5 AND docs_missing THEN block
Conditions under which rule can be overridden.
Application Form submission for Playgroup class
Block application; show age-appropriate class suggestion (Nursery if >2.5)
Application Form submission for Nursery class
Block application; suggest Playgroup (if <2.5) or Jr.KG (if >3.5)
Application Form submission for Jr.KG class
Block application; suggest Nursery (if <3.5) or Sr.KG (if >4.5)
Application Form submission for Sr.KG class
Block application; suggest Jr.KG (if <4.5) or Grade 1 (if >5.5)
Block submission; request acceptable age proof document
Mark application 'Pending Documents'; send automated reminder to parent (D+3, D+7, D+14)
Mark 'Pending Medical'; require signed medical declaration by parent + pediatrician certificate
Send automated reminder; allow admission approval conditional on photo within 7 days
Require acceptable parent ID proof upload
Require valid Indian mobile number (+91 format) for primary contact
Application Form submission with sibling_already_enrolled = TRUE
Auto-flag application as 'Sibling Priority'; fast-track counselling slot within 48 hours
Application Form submission with staff_ward = TRUE
Apply staff ward discount; route to HR validation for staff tenure confirmation
Mid-year application from student transferring from another school
Allow admission; carry forward previous attendance records
Reserve 25% seats for EWS category; integrate with state RTE portal for reimbursement claims
Admission conditional on assessment; if severity > moderate, recommend shadow teacher requirement
Application Form submission for Playgroup class
IF age_at_joining < 1.5 years OR age_at_joining > 2.5 years THEN ineligible
Block application; show age-appropriate class suggestion (Nursery if >2.5)
Branch Head discretionary approval with documented child development assessment reason
Application Form submission for Nursery class
IF age_at_joining < 2.5 years OR age_at_joining > 3.5 years THEN ineligible
Block application; suggest Playgroup (if <2.5) or Jr.KG (if >3.5)
Branch Head approval + child readiness assessment by qualified ECCE educator
Application Form submission for Jr.KG class
IF age_at_joining < 3.5 years OR age_at_joining > 4.5 years THEN ineligible
Block application; suggest Nursery (if <3.5) or Sr.KG (if >4.5)
Branch Head approval + prior schooling certificate verification
Application Form submission for Sr.KG class
IF age_at_joining < 4.5 years OR age_at_joining > 5.5 years THEN ineligible
Block application; suggest Jr.KG (if <4.5) or Grade 1 (if >5.5)
Branch Head approval + academic readiness assessment
IF age_proof_doc NOT IN [Birth Certificate, Passport, Aadhaar, Hospital Certificate] THEN ineligible
Block submission; request acceptable age proof document
Affidavit on stamp paper (₹100) for orphaned/adopted children with court order
IF birth_certificate_uploaded = FALSE THEN block admission approval
Mark application 'Pending Documents'; send automated reminder to parent (D+3, D+7, D+14)
Passport or Aadhaar accepted as substitute if Birth Certificate unavailable (with written undertaking)
IF medical_fitness_form = FALSE OR medical_declaration_signed = FALSE THEN block approval
Mark 'Pending Medical'; require signed medical declaration by parent + pediatrician certificate
Conditional admission with 7-day grace period for medical fitness certificate submission
IF passport_photo_count < 2 THEN block ID card generation
Send automated reminder; allow admission approval conditional on photo within 7 days
Photo captured at campus visit if parent unable to upload
IF parent_id_proof NOT IN [Aadhaar, PAN, Passport, Driving License] THEN block submission
Require acceptable parent ID proof upload
School management discretion for NRIs with international ID — passport mandatory
IF primary_contact_phone IS NULL OR primary_contact_phone NOT_VALID_INDIAN_MOBILE THEN block submission
Require valid Indian mobile number (+91 format) for primary contact
NRI parents — international number with country code accepted
Application Form submission with sibling_already_enrolled = TRUE
IF sibling_enrolled_in_same_school = TRUE AND sibling_status = ACTIVE THEN priority_score +10
Auto-flag application as 'Sibling Priority'; fast-track counselling slot within 48 hours
Sibling must have no fee due >30 days; if due pending, priority on hold
Application Form submission with staff_ward = TRUE
IF parent_is_staff = TRUE AND staff_tenure >= 1 year THEN eligible for 50% fee waiver + priority admission
Apply staff ward discount; route to HR validation for staff tenure confirmation
Tenure <1 year: pro-rata waiver (25% if 6-12 months, 0% if <6 months)
Mid-year application from student transferring from another school
IF transfer_certificate_provided = TRUE AND previous_school_attendance >= 75% THEN eligible
Allow admission; carry forward previous attendance records
Attendance <75% requires Branch Head approval + remedial plan documentation
RTE §5 (No denial of admission for transfer students)
IF entry_class (Playgroup/Nursery) AND ews_applications_received < 25% seats THEN flag for state reimbursement portal sync
Reserve 25% seats for EWS category; integrate with state RTE portal for reimbursement claims
School-specific quota may exceed 25% but cannot go below (mandatory minimum)
IF special_needs_assessment_pending = TRUE THEN route to special educator for assessment within 7 days
Admission conditional on assessment; if severity > moderate, recommend shadow teacher requirement
Cannot deny admission solely on special needs basis (RPWD Act 2016 §3)
Mark invoice overdue; trigger R-FIN-002 (late fee calculation); trigger R-NOT-001 (reminder)
Add late fee line item to invoice; send notification; if >60 days, block attendance marking + ID card
Refund Policy — Withdrawal Before Term Start
Parent submits withdrawal request before term start date
Process refund within 14 working days to original payment method
Parent submits withdrawal request after term start
Generate refund invoice; route to Branch Head approval; process within 14 days
Second+ child admission in same school
Auto-apply discount on invoice generation; visible as separate line item
Admission confirmed before April 30th for next academic year
Apply correct GST rate; generate GST-compliant invoice with HSN code, GSTIN, place of supply
Generate sequential invoice number; GST invoice series registered with GST portal
Auto-generate PDF receipt; email to parent; sync to parent app; archive in document store
Disable cash payment option above ₹50,000; show digital payment methods only
Reverse receipt; mark invoice unpaid; send demand notice (legal format) within 3 days; block future cheque payments for parent
Parent requests installment plan for annual fee
Create installment schedule; generate separate invoices per installment with respective due dates
Auto-flag eligible students; route to scholarship committee for final selection
Route to Finance Head + Director approval; if approved, write-off in books; retain recovery rights for 3 years
Route to appropriate approver based on amount; multi-level approval workflow
Schedule payment; auto-pay on due date via NEFT/RTGS
Deduct TDS; generate Form 16A quarterly; file TDS return; issue TDS certificate to vendor
Parent submits fee waiver request with documentation
Route to Branch Head + Director joint approval; waiver valid for current term only (renewal required)
Generate claim file; upload to state RTE portal; track reimbursement status; reconcile on receipt
Engage CA firm; provide books, invoices, receipts, bank statements; receive audit report; file ITR
IF current_date > due_date + 0 days THEN status = 'Overdue'
Mark invoice overdue; trigger R-FIN-002 (late fee calculation); trigger R-NOT-001 (reminder)
Holiday grace: if due_date falls on weekend/holiday, deadline extends to next working day
IF days_overdue BETWEEN 1 AND 7 THEN late_fee = 0; IF 8-30 THEN late_fee = ₹100; IF 31-60 THEN late_fee = ₹500; IF >60 THEN late_fee = ₹1000 + hold services
Add late fee line item to invoice; send notification; if >60 days, block attendance marking + ID card
Branch Head can waive late fee with documented reason (medical, family emergency, job loss)
Refund Policy — Withdrawal Before Term Start
Parent submits withdrawal request before term start date
IF withdrawal_request_date < term_start_date - 7 days THEN refund = 100% - ₹1000 processing; IF 1-7 days before THEN refund = 75%; IF after term start THEN refund = 0% (term fee non-refundable)
Process refund within 14 working days to original payment method
Medical emergency (with hospital certificate): 90% refund even after term start
School Policy 2024 §5.4; State School Fee Regulation Act
State Fee Regulation Act (varies by state)
Parent submits withdrawal request after term start
IF attendance_days < 30 THEN refund = 50% of annual fee proportionate; IF >= 30 THEN refund = 0%
Generate refund invoice; route to Branch Head approval; process within 14 days
Transfer case (parent job relocation >100km): 75% refund irrespective of attendance
Second+ child admission in same school
IF sibling_count_in_school = 2 THEN 10% discount on lower fee; IF = 3 THEN 15%; IF >= 4 THEN 20%
Auto-apply discount on invoice generation; visible as separate line item
Sibling discount not applicable on RTE quota seats (already subsidized)
Admission confirmed before April 30th for next academic year
IF admission_confirmation_date <= April 30 THEN 5% discount on annual tuition fee
Discount not stackable with staff ward waiver (R-ELG-012)
IF service_type IN [Tuition Fee, Activity Fee, Examination Fee] THEN GST = 0% (exempt); IF service_type IN [Transportation, Food/Canteen, Books/Materials] THEN GST = 5% or 18% per HSN
Apply correct GST rate; generate GST-compliant invoice with HSN code, GSTIN, place of supply
Pure preschool education (Playgroup-Sr.KG) is fully GST-exempt; only auxiliary services taxable
IF branch_id + financial_year + sequence_number = unique THEN assign; format: INV-{BRANCH}-{FY}-{SEQ:00000}
Generate sequential invoice number; GST invoice series registered with GST portal
Cancelled invoices retain number with status 'CANCELLED' — never reused
GST Act §31; GSTN Invoice Format Rules
IF payment_status = SUCCESS THEN generate receipt within 60 seconds; receipt number: RCT-{BRANCH}-{FY}-{SEQ}
Auto-generate PDF receipt; email to parent; sync to parent app; archive in document store
Failed payment generates no receipt; attempt logged for audit
GST Act (receipt as proof of payment)
IF payment_amount > ₹50,000 THEN digital payment mandatory (UPI/NetBanking/Card); cash rejected
Disable cash payment option above ₹50,000; show digital payment methods only
Cash accepted for amounts <₹50,000 with PAN number capture (Income Tax §269ST)
Income Tax Act §269ST; RBI Digital Payment Guidelines
IF cheque_bounce_reason = NSF THEN charge ₹500 bounce charge + original late fee (R-FIN-002)
Reverse receipt; mark invoice unpaid; send demand notice (legal format) within 3 days; block future cheque payments for parent
Bank error (rare): bank letter required; charges waived after verification
Parent requests installment plan for annual fee
IF requested_installments <= 4 AND parent_credit_history != 'default' THEN auto-approve; IF > 4 OR prior default THEN Branch Head approval required
Create installment schedule; generate separate invoices per installment with respective due dates
Default on any installment triggers full outstanding amount due immediately
IF child_attendance >= 95% AND milestone_score >= 90th percentile AND family_income < ₹8 lakh THEN eligible for 25% scholarship
Auto-flag eligible students; route to scholarship committee for final selection
Special talent scholarship (sports/arts) — separate evaluation criteria; income criteria relaxed
IF invoice_overdue_days > 365 AND recovery_attempts >= 3 THEN mark for write-off
Route to Finance Head + Director approval; if approved, write-off in books; retain recovery rights for 3 years
Recovery agent/legal action initiated: write-off held in abeyance
IF amount <= ₹5,000 THEN Branch Admin approve; IF 5,001-25,000 THEN Branch Head; IF 25,001-1,00,000 THEN Director; IF > 1,00,000 THEN Board approval
Route to appropriate approver based on amount; multi-level approval workflow
Emergency expenses (medical, fire, safety) bypass matrix — post-facto approval within 48 hours
IF vendor_invoice_amount_matches_grn = TRUE AND po_amount >= invoice_amount THEN approve for payment within agreed credit period (typically 30 days)
Schedule payment; auto-pay on due date via NEFT/RTGS
Early payment discount (2/10 net 30): if vendor offers 2% discount for 10-day payment, auto-avail
IF vendor_payment_threshold_crossed THEN deduct TDS per §194C (1% contract) or §194J (10% professional)
Deduct TDS; generate Form 16A quarterly; file TDS return; issue TDS certificate to vendor
Vendor with Lower Deduction Certificate (Form 13) — deduct at reduced rate per certificate
Parent submits fee waiver request with documentation
IF parent_job_loss_proven OR medical_emergency_proven THEN 25-50% waiver; IF death_of_earning_member THEN 100% waiver for current term
Route to Branch Head + Director joint approval; waiver valid for current term only (renewal required)
RTE students already subsidized — no additional waiver applicable
IF ews_student_enrolled AND ews_student_attendance >= 75% THEN claim per-child-reimbursement from state (either actual fee or state-per-capita-cost, whichever is lower)
Generate claim file; upload to state RTE portal; track reimbursement status; reconcile on receipt
State delay: provision for interest after 90 days per state RTE rules
RTE Act §12(2); State RTE Reimbursement Rules
IF financial_year_end = TRUE THEN initiate external audit within 30 days
Engage CA firm; provide books, invoices, receipts, bank statements; receive audit report; file ITR
Tax audit mandatory if turnover > ₹1 crore (§44AB)
Income Tax Act §44AB; Companies Act §139 (if incorporated)
Enforce max 4 authorized pickups per child; store photos + ID proof in encrypted form
Person arrives for child pickup not in authorized list
Hold child in supervision area; call parent for authorization; if confirmed via parent app OTP, allow pickup with photo capture
Child picked up after school closing time
Auto-generate late pickup invoice; notify parent; recurring late (>3 times/quarter) triggers meeting with Branch Head
Allow entry with late pass; log reason (parent input); recurring late (>3/week) triggers parent meeting
Flag for review; require parent meeting + remedial plan; conditional promotion with attendance improvement plan
Send reminder to teacher; after 60 min, escalate to Branch Admin to mark attendance
Generate digital gate pass; teacher releases child; security logs exit time
Capture visitor details; issue visitor badge; host notified via app; badge returned on exit
Transport opt-in during admission / annual renewal
Assign child to nearest pickup point; notify parent + driver; generate route card
Bus trip start (morning pickup / evening drop)
Auto-notify parents of expected delay; Transport In-charge calls driver; if unreachable >15 min, escalate to Branch Head
Bus arrives at school / drop point
Trigger P0 alert: Branch Head + Transport In-charge + Parent + Driver; halt bus; conduct physical search
Move child to health room; notify parent within 5 min; record observation in health log
Generate allergen-safe meal list per class; kitchen gets allergy-aware menu; serve alternative
Assign supervisor; conduct visual check every 10 min; record nap quality in daily sheet
Any incident reported (injury, illness, behavioral, safety)
Auto-route to appropriate escalation level; incident report generated; mandatory follow-up within 24 hours
Child photo captured for marketing/social media
Flag photos with consent status; AI face-blur applied for non-consenting children in batch photos
Each major daily activity completion (arrival, meal, activity, nap, pickup)
Auto-push timeline entry to parent app with timestamp, photo (if consent), activity description
Auto-label sample with date/meal/quantity; dispose after 48 hours; log retention + disposal
Assign staff per age group; log washroom visits in daily sheet; monitor frequency for health issues
Continuous recording; motion-detection alerts in restricted areas; auto-overwrite after 90 days
IF authorized_pickup_count > 4 THEN block additional entries; each pickup person must have photo + ID proof
Enforce max 4 authorized pickups per child; store photos + ID proof in encrypted form
Court-ordered guardianship: additional entries with legal documentation
Person arrives for child pickup not in authorized list
IF pickup_person_id NOT IN child.authorized_pickup_list THEN block release
Hold child in supervision area; call parent for authorization; if confirmed via parent app OTP, allow pickup with photo capture
Police/emergency services pickup: with written documentation + Branch Head presence
Child picked up after school closing time
IF pickup_time > school_close_time + 15 min THEN charge ₹100 per 30 min late
Auto-generate late pickup invoice; notify parent; recurring late (>3 times/quarter) triggers meeting with Branch Head
Medical emergency (with proof): fee waived; traffic conditions: first-time grace
IF arrival_time > school_start_time + 30 min THEN mark 'Late Arrival' in attendance
Allow entry with late pass; log reason (parent input); recurring late (>3/week) triggers parent meeting
Medical appointment: late arrival excused with doctor's note
IF annual_attendance < 75% THEN not eligible for auto-promotion; case review by Principal
Flag for review; require parent meeting + remedial plan; conditional promotion with attendance improvement plan
Medical condition with hospital certificate: threshold relaxed to 60%
IF teacher NOT marked attendance by start_time + 30 min THEN system escalation
Send reminder to teacher; after 60 min, escalate to Branch Admin to mark attendance
Substitute teacher scenario: substitute responsible for marking
IF parent_request_received AND parent_is_authorized_pickup THEN issue gate pass with reason code
Generate digital gate pass; teacher releases child; security logs exit time
Unauthorized person: denied; emergency medical: with Branch Head approval
IF visitor_purpose = 'School Visit' THEN mandatory: photo + ID proof + purpose + host name + entry/exit time
Capture visitor details; issue visitor badge; host notified via app; badge returned on exit
Regular service providers (vendors, school bus drivers) — pre-registered with annual badges
Transport opt-in during admission / annual renewal
IF child_address_within_route_radius = TRUE AND seats_available = TRUE THEN assign route
Assign child to nearest pickup point; notify parent + driver; generate route card
Special needs child: priority routing + seat allocation near driver attendant
Bus trip start (morning pickup / evening drop)
IF gps_signal_lost > 5 min THEN alert Transport In-charge + parent notification
Auto-notify parents of expected delay; Transport In-charge calls driver; if unreachable >15 min, escalate to Branch Head
Tunnel/poor signal areas: 15-min grace before alert
Bus arrives at school / drop point
IF child_marked_on_bus = TRUE AND child_not_present_at_arrival = TRUE THEN immediate alert
Trigger P0 alert: Branch Head + Transport In-charge + Parent + Driver; halt bus; conduct physical search
IF child_showing_symptoms [fever, rash, contagious signs] THEN isolate + call parent for pickup
Move child to health room; notify parent within 5 min; record observation in health log
Chronic conditions (asthma, allergies) with medication plan: child stays with monitoring
IF child_allergy_list intersects today_meal_ingredients THEN allergen-safe alternative meal served
Generate allergen-safe meal list per class; kitchen gets allergy-aware menu; serve alternative
None — allergy rule, no exceptions (life safety)
IF child_age < 4 years AND nap_opted = TRUE THEN mandatory supervised nap; supervisor:child ratio 1:8
Assign supervisor; conduct visual check every 10 min; record nap quality in daily sheet
Child refuses nap: quiet activity alternative with supervisor monitoring
Any incident reported (injury, illness, behavioral, safety)
IF severity = LOW (minor scratch) THEN teacher logs; IF MEDIUM (minor injury) THEN Branch Admin + parent notified; IF HIGH (hospital) THEN Branch Head + Director + parent immediate call
Auto-route to appropriate escalation level; incident report generated; mandatory follow-up within 24 hours
None — incident reporting mandatory, no suppression allowed
Child photo captured for marketing/social media
IF parent_marketing_consent = FALSE THEN child's face auto-blurred in marketing materials; class photos OK
Flag photos with consent status; AI face-blur applied for non-consenting children in batch photos
Marketing consent can be withdrawn anytime via parent app; takes effect within 24 hours
Each major daily activity completion (arrival, meal, activity, nap, pickup)
IF activity_completed = TRUE AND parent_push_enabled = TRUE THEN push timeline entry within 5 min
Auto-push timeline entry to parent app with timestamp, photo (if consent), activity description
Network failure: timeline cached, pushed on reconnection; no data loss
IF meal_served = TRUE THEN retain sample (50g) for 48 hours in refrigerated storage
Auto-label sample with date/meal/quantity; dispose after 48 hours; log retention + disposal
IF child_age < 3.5 years THEN mandatory staff assistance; IF 3.5-5 years THEN staff escort to door; IF > 5 years THEN independent with periodic check
Assign staff per age group; log washroom visits in daily sheet; monitor frequency for health issues
Special needs child: one-on-one assistance irrespective of age
IF area IN [classroom, corridor, gate, playground, kitchen] THEN mandatory CCTV coverage; retention = 90 days
Continuous recording; motion-detection alerts in restricted areas; auto-overwrite after 90 days
Washrooms, changing rooms: NO cameras (POCSO/privacy law)
Auto-create theme calendar; each theme duration 3-4 weeks; activities linked to theme
Send reminder Friday 5 PM; escalate to Coordinator Saturday 10 AM; Coordinator prepares default plan if not received by Saturday 5 PM
Enforce minimum activities per day; system warns if teacher marks fewer activities
Friday summary: list of children with missing observations; teacher must complete by Saturday EOD
Prompt teacher to expand observation; weekly review by Coordinator; recurring low-quality triggers coaching
Generate assessment templates per age group; teachers complete within 2 weeks; parents get milestone report
Auto-flag; parent-teacher meeting scheduled within 14 days; if developmental concern, recommend specialist assessment
Auto-compile portfolio entries (observations, photos, artwork, milestone progress); share with parent via app
AI-assisted draft (combines observations, milestones, activities); teacher review + edit; parent notification + app push
Multi-level approval workflow; locked once approved; parent release after final approval
Auto-promote; update student record; notify parent; assign to next class section
Flag for Principal review; parent meeting; may recommend transition to mainstream school (Sr.KG → Grade 1)
Auto-schedule PTM; parent invites via app + SMS; teacher prepares child progress summary; PTM attendance logged
Auto-enroll in 4-week remedial track; weekly progress monitoring; specialist consultation if no improvement
Enforce minimum outdoor time in daily schedule; if weather prevents, indoor gross-motor activities substitute
Prompt teacher to log reason (mood, health, social); if pattern persists, parent notification
Committee meeting in May; revised curriculum approved by June; new theme calendar published
Block trip if any criterion fails; generate permission slips; pre-trip safety briefing; post-trip report
IF class IN [Playgroup, Nursery, Jr.KG, Sr.KG] THEN minimum 12 themes per year (1 per month)
Auto-create theme calendar; each theme duration 3-4 weeks; activities linked to theme
Festival/special event months: theme adjusted to align with cultural context
IF teacher.lesson_plan_for_next_week NOT submitted by Friday 5 PM THEN escalation
Send reminder Friday 5 PM; escalate to Coordinator Saturday 10 AM; Coordinator prepares default plan if not received by Saturday 5 PM
Holiday week: deadline extended to next working day
IF class = Playgroup/Nursery THEN min 6 activity slots; IF Jr/Sr.KG THEN min 8 slots
Enforce minimum activities per day; system warns if teacher marks fewer activities
Special event days (sports day, festival): customized activity schedule
IF teacher NOT recorded min 1 observation per child per week THEN system alert
Friday summary: list of children with missing observations; teacher must complete by Saturday EOD
Child absent >3 days in week: observation waived for that week
IF observation_text_length < 20 chars OR observation_text = 'Good'/'Fine' THEN flag as low-quality
Prompt teacher to expand observation; weekly review by Coordinator; recurring low-quality triggers coaching
AI Observation Assistant: teacher can accept AI-suggested expansion (with edit) — auto-qualifies
IF quarter_end = TRUE THEN mandatory milestone assessment for all enrolled children
Generate assessment templates per age group; teachers complete within 2 weeks; parents get milestone report
Child enrolled <30 days in quarter: assessment deferred to next quarter
IF child_milestone_score < 50th percentile for age THEN flag for monitoring; IF <25th percentile THEN developmental concern flag
Auto-flag; parent-teacher meeting scheduled within 14 days; if developmental concern, recommend specialist assessment
Premature birth / known developmental history: calibrated milestones per pediatrician guidance
IF month_end = TRUE THEN min 4 portfolio entries per child (1 per week)
Auto-compile portfolio entries (observations, photos, artwork, milestone progress); share with parent via app
Child absent >50% in month: portfolio reflects available entries with explanatory note
IF term_end = TRUE THEN generate report card for every active child
AI-assisted draft (combines observations, milestones, activities); teacher review + edit; parent notification + app push
Child enrolled <60 days in term: abbreviated report card with note
IF class = Playgroup/Nursery THEN Coordinator approval; IF Jr/Sr.KG THEN Coordinator + Principal approval
Multi-level approval workflow; locked once approved; parent release after final approval
Disagreement on assessment: teacher can request re-review with documented rationale
IF annual_attendance >= 75% AND milestone_score >= 50th percentile AND fee_clearance = TRUE THEN auto-promote to next class
Auto-promote; update student record; notify parent; assign to next class section
Fails any criterion: case review by Principal; conditional promotion with improvement plan OR retention (RTE §16 prohibits expulsion)
IF promoted_child_age > class_max_age + 1 year THEN discussion with parent for grade-appropriate placement
Flag for Principal review; parent meeting; may recommend transition to mainstream school (Sr.KG → Grade 1)
Special needs child: continue in preschool with modified curriculum (RPWD Act compliance)
IF quarter_end = TRUE THEN mandatory PTM for all classes
Auto-schedule PTM; parent invites via app + SMS; teacher prepares child progress summary; PTM attendance logged
Parent unable to attend: reschedule within 7 days; if 2+ missed PTMs, escalate to Branch Head
IF child_milestone_score < 25th percentile OR teacher_flags_concern = TRUE THEN enroll in remedial program
Auto-enroll in 4-week remedial track; weekly progress monitoring; specialist consultation if no improvement
Parent refusal: documented; child continues regular curriculum; quarterly reassessment
IF class = Playgroup/Nursery THEN min 60 min outdoor; IF Jr/Sr.KG THEN min 90 min
Enforce minimum outdoor time in daily schedule; if weather prevents, indoor gross-motor activities substitute
Air quality index > 200 (poor): indoor alternatives; rain: indoor play area
School Policy 2024 §6.11; WHO Physical Activity Guidelines
IF child_participation_in_activity = FALSE for >3 consecutive activities THEN teacher investigation
Prompt teacher to log reason (mood, health, social); if pattern persists, parent notification
Child new to school (<2 weeks): grace period for adjustment
IF academic_year_end = TRUE THEN curriculum review committee evaluates theme effectiveness, milestone outcomes, parent feedback
Committee meeting in May; revised curriculum approved by June; new theme calendar published
Mid-year emergency revision allowed with Branch Head approval (e.g., pandemic-driven changes)
IF field_trip_planned = TRUE THEN mandatory: parent consent (per child), staff:child ratio 1:5, first aid kit, emergency contact list
Block trip if any criterion fails; generate permission slips; pre-trip safety briefing; post-trip report
Mandatory qualification verification; reject if not met; document reason
Mandatory: police verification (within 30 days), 2 reference checks, previous employer verification, address proof
Auto-credit leave balance on April 1; carry forward max 5 earned leaves
Route to appropriate approver; ensure substitute teacher arrangement for teaching staff
Auto-assign from substitute pool; if unavailable, Coordinator covers; parent notification if delay >30 min
Lock attendance on 25th EOD; process payroll 26-28; final review 29th; disbursement 30th
Mandatory: notice period (60 days full-time, 30 days part-time); handover document; exit interview; final settlement within 30 days
Constitute ICC; publish committee details on notice board + employee handbook; annual training
Online POSH module; quiz with 80% pass mark; certificate valid 1 year; non-completion blocks payroll
Annual medical checkup; certificate on file; non-completion blocks kitchen duties
Probation review at end of period; confirmation OR extension (max 6 months) OR termination
IF role = Teacher AND qualification NOT IN [Diploma in ECCE, B.Ed, NTT, Montessori Diploma] THEN reject
Mandatory qualification verification; reject if not met; document reason
Assistant teacher: 12th pass + ECCE certificate in progress (1-year grace)
NEP 2020 ECCE Teacher Qualification Norms; School Policy 2024 §7.1
IF police_verification_pending = TRUE OR reference_check_pending = TRUE THEN block joining
Mandatory: police verification (within 30 days), 2 reference checks, previous employer verification, address proof
IF staff_role = Full-time AND tenure >= 1 year THEN 12 casual + 15 earned + 12 sick leaves
Auto-credit leave balance on April 1; carry forward max 5 earned leaves
Maternity: 26 weeks per Maternity Benefit Act; Paternity: 5 days
IF leave_type = Casual AND consecutive_days > 3 THEN Branch Head approval required; IF > 7 THEN Director approval
Route to appropriate approver; ensure substitute teacher arrangement for teaching staff
Medical leave with hospital certificate: bypass consecutive limit
IF teacher_absent = TRUE AND class_has_session_today = TRUE THEN assign substitute within 30 min
Auto-assign from substitute pool; if unavailable, Coordinator covers; parent notification if delay >30 min
Multiple teacher absence: priority by class age (younger children get priority)
IF attendance_recorded_through_25th = TRUE THEN payroll processed on 28th; credit on 30th/31st
Lock attendance on 25th EOD; process payroll 26-28; final review 29th; disbursement 30th
Weekend: payroll credit shifted to last working day
School Policy 2024 §7.5; Payment of Wages Act
IF staff_tenure >= 6 months THEN mandatory annual performance review
Probation staff (<6 months): no formal review; informal 90-day check-in
IF notice_period_served = TRUE AND handover_complete = TRUE AND dues_cleared = TRUE THEN process exit
Mandatory: notice period (60 days full-time, 30 days part-time); handover document; exit interview; final settlement within 30 days
Termination for cause: immediate exit with pending dues adjustment + legal hold
School Policy 2024 §7.7; Industrial Employment Standing Orders Act
IF staff_count >= 10 THEN mandatory ICC with: senior woman employee as chair + 2 women members + 1 external NGO member
Constitute ICC; publish committee details on notice board + employee handbook; annual training
Staff < 10: constitute Internal Complaints Committee per state rules (may combine with other branches)
IF staff_status = ACTIVE THEN mandatory POSH training completion by May 31
Online POSH module; quiz with 80% pass mark; certificate valid 1 year; non-completion blocks payroll
Maternity/long leave staff: 30 days post-return grace period
IF staff_role IN [Cook, Kitchen Helper, Food Server] THEN mandatory medical certificate with stool/urine test
Annual medical checkup; certificate on file; non-completion blocks kitchen duties
IF staff_role = Full-time THEN probation = 6 months; IF Part-time THEN 3 months
Probation review at end of period; confirmation OR extension (max 6 months) OR termination
Senior hires (Coordinator+): probation 3 months with early confirmation option
Create PR with vendor suggestion; route to Branch Admin approval; auto-set expected delivery date
Send P0 alert to Inventory Manager + Branch Admin; emergency procurement process
GRN for perishable item (food, paint, glue)
FIFO issuance: oldest stock issued first; expiring items flagged in kitchen / classroom dashboard
Mark item as 'Expired - Dispose'; generate disposal log; Inventory Manager + Branch Head joint approval for write-off
